channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Cronos: The New Dawn wins Best Polish Game at the Digital Dragons Awards
item.content:encoded:
When May rolls around, it brings with it the most important night in Polish game development, the Digital Dragons Awards. This yearly event, focused on developers, publishers and tech companies, showcases the biggest Polish games of the last year, as well as highlighting both indie and international games too. This year’s biggest winner was the exceptional Cronos: The New Dawn, taking home the coveted Polish Game of the Year 2026.

This year saw a number of incredible games from Polish studios. Up for many of the main awards were big hitters like Techland’s Dying Light: The Beast, Bloober Team’s Cronos: The New Dawn, and 11 Bit Studio’s The Alters. Joining them were indie darlings such as Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon and sci-fi FPS Metal Eden, showcasing just how vibrant and strong the Polish game development scene is.

The full list of awards, winners and nominees can be found below:

Best Polish Game of 2025

Cronos: The New Dawn (Bloober Team)
Dying Light: The Beast (Techland)
RoboCop: Rogue City – Unfinished Business (Teyon)
Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon (Questline)
The Alters (11 bit studios)

Best Polish Game Design of 2025

Cronos: The New Dawn (Bloober Team)
Dying Light: The Beast (Techland)
Forever Skies (Far From Home)
Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon (Questline)
Winner – The Alters (11 bit studios)

Best Polish Game Visual Art of 2025

Winner – Cronos: The New Dawn (Bloober Team)
Dying Light: The Beast (Techland)
METAL EDEN (Reikon Games)
Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon (Questline)
The Alters (11 bit studios)

Best Polish Game Audio of 2025

Winner – Cronos: The New Dawn (Bloober Team)
Dying Light: The Beast (Techland)
METAL EDEN (Reikon Games)
Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon (Questline)
The Alters (11 bit studios)

Best Polish Narrative of 2025

Cronos: The New Dawn (Bloober Team)
Dying Light: The Beast (Techland)
Sejm The Game (Simplicity Games)
Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon (Questline)
Winner – The Alters (11 bit studios)

Best Polish Mobile Game of 2025

Winner – #DRIVE Rally (Pixel Perfect Dude)
Arcanterra: A Story-Driven RPG (Funventure P.S.A.)
Cats and Wrenches (Adrian Zarzycki)
Mini Golf Club – PvP Multiplayer (BoomBit, Inc.)
Space Squad Survival (Rebel Twins)

Best Foreign Game of 2025

ARC Raiders (Embark Studios)
Winner – Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (Sandfall Interactive)
Ghost of Yōtei (Sucker Punch Productions)
Hollow Knight: Silksong (Team Cherry)
Kingdom Come: Deliverance II (Warhorse Studios)

Indie Dragons Awards

Winner – Mutter (Deadly Crow Games)

2nd Place – Foxy Dumplings (Soft Crunch Games)

3rd Place – Demon Bluff (Umiart)

Special Recognition Award

Winner – Grzegorz Wqtroba

Related stories from TSA



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/18/cronos-the-new-dawn-wins-best-polish-game-at-the-digital-dragons-awards/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Football Manager 26 gets international management ahead of FIFA World Cup
item.content:encoded:
Football Manager 26 launched with one of the series’ big features missing, that being international management. Players could not choose to manage an international team and guide them to glory in international tournaments. From May 26th, that will change as Sports Interactive has announced that international management will be added to Football Manager 26 ahead of the FIFA World Cup, which is licensed for the first time.

From May 26th, 47 of the 48 qualified teams will be playable but not all teams will have their official kits as licensing discussions are still happening. When the update launches you will be able to start up the FIFA World Cup 26 mode, which begins on May 11th allowing you to play two friendlies before heading to the tournament proper. You can opt to manage your club and an international team simultaenously, with your clubs season being simulated up to May 11th if you go down that route. You can also import saves from FM23 and FM24 for international teams.

There have been changes made to international management as it comes to Football Manager 26. One of those its the Provisional Squad selection system, which allows players to call up a large selection of players and then choose to cut that list down to the final squad. In the Squad Planner, there will be an option to select a provisional squad too. The National Shortlist will include an overview called Player Discovery of eligible players and their recent performances at club level, along with what their international expectations are so you can see who is expecting to be called up and players who think they have no chance. Scouts will also be able to find players that have dual citizenship who have not yet decided which country to play for. When it comes to match preparation for each game, you will be able to set the focus for in possession, out of possession, and set pieces. Player recovery will also be improved so they can play more matches in the tournament too.

Source: Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/18/football-manager-26-gets-international-management-ahead-of-fifa-world-cup/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
